panels.title: Hook events
panels.description: Total connector hook invocations in range.

panels.title: Connectors active
panels.description: Distinct hook connectors with activity in range.

panels.title: User prompts
panels.description: Prompt-submit hook invocations observed in the selected range. Invocation telemetry is authoritative for lifecycle events; outcome telemetry is reserved for evaluated results.

panels.title: Tool calls
panels.description: Pre-tool-use hook events (tool calls observed).

panels.title: Shadow blocks
panels.description: Actions a policy WOULD have blocked (observe mode -> allowed).

panels.title: Findings
panels.description: Scan findings emitted in range (all scanners).

panels.title: Input tokens
panels.description: Connector-attributed input tokens reported during the selected range. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the range contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. No series means the selected connector did not report token usage; it is not a measured zero.

targets.expr: sum((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="input"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="input"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="input"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="input"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="input"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Output tokens
panels.description: Connector-attributed output tokens reported during the selected range. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the range contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. No series means the selected connector did not report token usage; it is not a measured zero.

targets.expr: sum((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="output"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="output"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="output"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="output"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",kind="output"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Hook event volume by type and connector
Hook events / sec by event type
panels.description: Canonical connector hook invocation rate grouped by hook event type.

panels.title: Hook events / sec by connector
panels.description: Per-connector hook throughput (hook-agnostic).

panels.title: Hook events by event type
panels.description: Share of connector hook invocations grouped by hook event type in the selected range.

panels.title: Events by connector
panels.description: Share of hook events by connector in range.

panels.title: Canonical event types (range)
panels.description: Canonical v8 log envelopes grouped by event_name for the selected range. Source: generated log families under schemas/telemetry/v8, routed to Loki by the local-observability destination.

panels.title: Shadow blocks - what observe mode caught (would_block=true)
Shadow blocks / sec by connector x severity
panels.description: Would-be blocks by connector and severity.

panels.title: Shadow blocks by severity
panels.description: Severity mix of would-be blocks.

panels.title: Shadow blocks by hook event type
panels.description: Hook event types that produced an observe-mode would-block decision.

panels.title: Reported token aggregates
panels.description: Count of bounded connector/direction token aggregate series; exact identities remain in logs.

targets.expr: count(sum by (connector, kind) ((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__range))) > 0)

panels.title: Shadow block decision detail
panels.description: Connector-facing hook decisions where would_block=true. The bounded decision metadata is shown without re-emitting the raw command payload.

panels.title: Tokens / sec by type
panels.description: Connector-attributed input/output tokens reported per second. This is a window-average rate: established series use counter delta divided by the window; a series first published inside the window uses its latest cumulative completion value divided by the window. It is not an instantaneous rate. No series means the selected connector did not report token usage.

targets.expr: sum by (kind) ((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__rate_interval]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__rate_interval]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__rate_interval) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__rate_interval]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__rate_interval))) / ($__rate_interval_ms / 1000)

panels.title: Reported cumulative cost by model
panels.description: Connector-reported cumulative cost from canonical logs, grouped by model without promoting identity to metric labels.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, model) (max by (provider, model, agent_id, lifecycle_id) (max_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | body_defenseclaw_agent_reported_cost_present="true" | label_format provider="{{if .body_gen_ai_provider_name}}{{.body_gen_ai_provider_name}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", model="{{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else if .body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", agent_id="{{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}}", lifecycle_id="{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id}}" | unwrap body_defenseclaw_agent_reported_cost_usd [$__interval])))

panels.title: Reported tokens by exact model
panels.description: Connector-attributed reported tokens grouped by the exact normalized request-model label. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the range contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. Missing models mean token usage was not reported.

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_request_model) ((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Reported tokens by provider
panels.description: Connector-attributed reported tokens grouped by the normalized provider label. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the range contributes its latest cumulative completion value once.

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_provider_name) ((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Model operation span p95 by model
panels.description: 95th percentile duration of connector-attributed model operation spans. No series means eligible spans were not reported.

panels.title: Reported tokens by agent, model & direction
panels.description: Connector-reported tokens from canonical model.response logs, deduplicated by logical event and grouped by exact identity.

targets.expr: sum by (connector, agent_id, agent_name, root_agent_id, model, kind) (max by (connector, agent_id, agent_name, root_agent_id, model, kind, logical_event_id) (max_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="model.response" | body_defenseclaw_telemetry_tokens_reported="true" | label_format logical_event_id="{{if .correlation_logical_event_id}}logical:{{.correlation_logical_event_id}}{{else if .correlation_semantic_event_id}}semantic:{{.correlation_semantic_event_id}}{{else}}record:{{.record_id}}{{end}}", root_agent_id="{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_root_id}}", agent_id="{{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}}", agent_name="{{if .body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{.body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", model="{{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else if .body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", kind="input" | unwrap body_gen_ai_usage_input_tokens [$__range])))

sum by (connector, agent_id, agent_name, root_agent_id, model, kind) (max by (connector, agent_id, agent_name, root_agent_id, model, kind, logical_event_id) (max_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="model.response" | body_defenseclaw_telemetry_tokens_reported="true" | label_format logical_event_id="{{if .correlation_logical_event_id}}logical:{{.correlation_logical_event_id}}{{else if .correlation_semantic_event_id}}semantic:{{.correlation_semantic_event_id}}{{else}}record:{{.record_id}}{{end}}", root_agent_id="{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_root_id}}", agent_id="{{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}}", agent_name="{{if .body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{.body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", model="{{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else if .body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", kind="output" | unwrap body_gen_ai_usage_output_tokens [$__range])))

panels.title: LLM prompts (live)
panels.description: Prompt events captured for the selected connector. Content is shown only as allowed by the active v8 bucket projection and redaction profile.

panels.title: LLM responses and failures (live)
panels.description: Observed model/agent outputs and terminal model-call failures for the selected connector. Expand a row for every field present after DefenseClaw's central v8 projection.

panels.title: Tools — names, categories, and projected details
Terminal tool outcomes by tool name (range)
panels.description: Completed, failed, and blocked tool outcomes grouped by tool name for the selected connector.

targets.expr: sum by (tool_name)(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"tool[.]invocation[.](completed|failed|blocked)" | label_format tool_name="{{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Terminal tool outcomes by category (range)
panels.description: Completed, failed, and blocked tool outcomes grouped with the same mutually exclusive capability taxonomy used by the Agent360 DAG: Skills, MCP, Bash, File edits, Collaboration, Web / browser, Visual, Task control, or the exact unrecognized name.

targets.expr: sum by (tool_family)(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"tool[.]invocation[.](completed|failed|blocked)" | label_format tool_family=`{{if contains "skill" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name)}}Skills{{else if hasPrefix "mcp" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name)}}MCP{{else if or (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "bash") (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "shell") (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "exec_command") (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "run_shell_command") (contains "shell" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name)) (contains "terminal" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name))}}Bash{{else if eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "apply_patch"}}File edits{{else if hasPrefix "collaboration" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name)}}Collaboration{{else if or (hasPrefix "web" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name)) (contains "browser" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name))}}Web / browser{{else if or (contains "image" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name)) (contains "visual" (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name))}}Visual{{else if or (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "update_plan") (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "get_goal") (eq (lower .body_gen_ai_tool_name) "update_goal")}}Task control{{else}}{{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}}{{end}}` [$__range]))

panels.title: Projected tool command details (live)
panels.description: Full requested and terminal tool records exactly as present after DefenseClaw's central OTEL projection. The panel adds no truncation: arguments, result, status, exit code, ownership, lifecycle, operation, and W3C correlation are rendered when exported.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"tool[.]invocation[.](requested|started|completed|failed|blocked)" | line_format "{{.event_name}} | connector={{.connector}} agent={{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}} root={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_root_id}} parent={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_parent_id}} depth={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_depth}} | lifecycle={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id}} execution={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id}} operation={{.body_defenseclaw_operation_id}} turn={{.body_defenseclaw_turn_id}} | tool={{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}} type={{.body_gen_ai_tool_type}} provider={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_provider}} skill={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_skill_key}} call={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_id}} status={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_status}} exit={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_exit_code}} destination={{.body_defenseclaw_destination_app}} | arguments={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_arguments}} | result={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_result}} | outcome={{.outcome}} | trace_id={{.correlation_trace_id}} span_id={{.correlation_span_id}}"

panels.title: Projected URL references and host summaries
Distinct external hosts
panels.description: Distinct non-local hostnames referenced in projected log payloads for the selected connector. This is not authoritative network-access telemetry.

targets.expr: count(sum by (host)(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" |~ "https?://" | regexp "https?://(?P<host>[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)" | host!="" | host!~"localhost|127\\..*|.*\\.local|prometheus|loki|tempo|grafana|0\\.0\\.0\\.0" [$__range])))

panels.title: URL hosts referenced in projected payloads (range)
panels.description: Hostnames extracted from projected log payloads for the selected connector. Redaction may remove references; this does not prove that network access occurred.

targets.expr: topk(25, sum by (host)(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" |~ "https?://" | regexp "https?://(?P<host>[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)" | host!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: URL references in projected payloads
panels.description: Selected-connector log events whose retained payload references a URL. Use structured egress events for authoritative access decisions.

panels.title: Session-tree lifecycle drilldown — root to terminal
Reported tokens for selected session tree
panels.description: Connector-reported tokens for the selected root session tree from canonical logs, deduplicated by logical event.

targets.expr: sum by (agent_id, agent_name, model, kind) (max by (agent_id, agent_name, model, kind, logical_event_id) (max_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |~ "$session" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | (body_defenseclaw_session_root_id=~"$session" or body_gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or body_defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | body_gen_ai_agent_id=~"$agent" | event_name="model.response" | body_defenseclaw_telemetry_tokens_reported="true" | label_format logical_event_id="{{if .correlation_logical_event_id}}logical:{{.correlation_logical_event_id}}{{else if .correlation_semantic_event_id}}semantic:{{.correlation_semantic_event_id}}{{else}}record:{{.record_id}}{{end}}", agent_id="{{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}}", agent_name="{{if .body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{.body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", model="{{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else if .body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", kind="input" | unwrap body_gen_ai_usage_input_tokens [$__range])))

sum by (agent_id, agent_name, model, kind) (max by (agent_id, agent_name, model, kind, logical_event_id) (max_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |~ "$session" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | (body_defenseclaw_session_root_id=~"$session" or body_gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or body_defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | body_gen_ai_agent_id=~"$agent" | event_name="model.response" | body_defenseclaw_telemetry_tokens_reported="true" | label_format logical_event_id="{{if .correlation_logical_event_id}}logical:{{.correlation_logical_event_id}}{{else if .correlation_semantic_event_id}}semantic:{{.correlation_semantic_event_id}}{{else}}record:{{.record_id}}{{end}}", agent_id="{{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}}", agent_name="{{if .body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{.body_gen_ai_agent_name}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", model="{{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else if .body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", kind="output" | unwrap body_gen_ai_usage_output_tokens [$__range])))

panels.title: Canonical events (selected root session tree)
panels.description: Select a Root session to count canonical events recorded anywhere in that root-session tree, or leave All selected to count events across all root sessions in the active range.

panels.title: Shadow blocks (root session tree)
panels.description: Select a Root session to count canonical hook_decision records with would_block=true anywhere in that tree, or leave All selected to evaluate all root sessions in the active range. Zero means no matching advisory block occurred.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |~ "$session" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | (body_defenseclaw_session_root_id=~"$session" or body_gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or body_defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | event_name="hook_decision" | body_defenseclaw_guardrail_would_block="true" [$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Ordered session-tree lifecycle and work timeline
panels.description: Select a Root session to render its ascending canonical chronology, or leave All selected to inspect all root sessions. Every retained v8 record in scope is included. The rendered line exposes session, lineage provenance, lifecycle, execution, request, turn, operation, model, tool, approval, guardrail, outcome, trace, and span correlation; expanded rows expose every centrally projected OTEL field without dashboard-side truncation.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} |~ "$session" | json | __error__="" | connector=~"$connector" | (body_defenseclaw_session_root_id=~"$session" or body_gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or body_defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | body_gen_ai_agent_id=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_user_id=~"$user" | line_format "#{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_sequence}} · {{.event_name}} · user={{.body_user_id}}/{{.body_defenseclaw_user_name}} agent={{.body_gen_ai_agent_id}}/{{.body_gen_ai_agent_name}} type={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_type}} instance={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_instance_id}} root={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_root_id}} parent={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_parent_id}} depth={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_depth}} lineage={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lineage_provenance}} · session={{.body_gen_ai_conversation_id}} root_session={{.body_defenseclaw_session_root_id}} parent_session={{.body_defenseclaw_session_parent_id}} source={{.body_defenseclaw_session_source}} resumed={{.body_defenseclaw_session_resumed}} · lifecycle={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id}}/{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_event}}/{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_state}} execution={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id}} phase={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_phase_previous}}→{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_phase}} · request={{.body_defenseclaw_request_id}} turn={{.body_defenseclaw_turn_id}} run={{.body_defenseclaw_run_id}} operation={{.body_defenseclaw_operation_id}} · model={{.body_gen_ai_provider_name}}/{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}→{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}} model_request={{.body_defenseclaw_model_request_id}} model_response={{.body_defenseclaw_model_response_id}} · tool={{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}} type={{.body_gen_ai_tool_type}} call={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_id}} provider={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_provider}} skill={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_skill_key}} status={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_status}} exit={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_exit_code}} destination={{.body_defenseclaw_destination_app}} · approval={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_id}} result={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_result}} actor={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_actor_type}} dangerous={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_dangerous}} · hook={{.body_defenseclaw_hook_event}} action={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_effective_action}} raw={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_raw_action}} enforced={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_enforced}} would_block={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_would_block}} · outcome={{.outcome}} · trace_id={{.correlation_trace_id}} span_id={{.correlation_span_id}}"

title: DefenseClaw - Agent Activity (Live)
description: Cross-agent live activity explorer for hook events, model usage, tools, internet destinations, and session correlation. Dedicated Agent360, Findings, AI Discovery, and Runtime dashboards own deep lifecycle, finding, inventory, and pipeline analysis.
